page_metadata.biotools__summary: Perform single marker association testing on raw next generation sequencing data. It allows for flexible covariates adjustment and does not require genotype calling. Provides a likelihood ratio test (LRT), score test and a combination of the two.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Perform single marker association testing on raw next generation sequencing data. It allows for flexible covariates adjustment and does not require genotype calling. Provides a likelihood ratio test (LRT), score test and a combination of the two.
